summary: Product Upload Wizard, VendorOps Dashboard, and Settings Hub Catalog testing complete. Backend: 15/15 tests pass. Frontend: All features verified - wizard loads with 6 steps, VendorOps has toggle publish and price request actions, Settings Hub has Catalog group with 4 tabs.
seed_data_creation: Created test products (TEST_Wizard_Product_*, TEST_Variant_Product_*, TEST_Toggle_*) and price requests (TEST_Custom_Service_*, TEST_Quote_Service_*, TEST_Ready_Service_*) during testing - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product Upload Wizard and Settings Hub Catalog features fully implemented and tested. Key features verified: 1) Wizard at /admin/vendor-ops/new-product with 6 steps (Basic Info, Images, Pricing, Variants, Stock & Vendor, Review). 2) GET /api/vendor-ops/catalog-config returns units, categories, variant_types, sku_prefix, sku_format from Settings Hub. 3) VendorOps dashboard has toggle publish (eye icon) on products and Enter Quote/Ready for Sales buttons on price requests. 4) Settings Hub has Catalog group with 4 tabs: Units of Measurement, Product Categories, Variant Types, SKU Configuration. 5) SKU preview updates dynamically. 6) Categories can be added/removed.

backend_apis.GET /api/vendor-ops/catalog-config: PASS - Returns units (16 items), categories (12 items), variant_types (5 items), sku_prefix (KNT), sku_format ({PREFIX}-{CATEGORY}-{RANDOM})
backend_apis.POST /api/vendor-ops/products: PASS - Creates product with all fields including variants
backend_apis.PUT /api/vendor-ops/price-requests/{id}: PASS - Enter quote transitions to response_received, mark ready_for_sales works
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/settings-hub: PASS - Returns catalog section with units, categories, variant_types
backend_apis.PUT /api/admin/settings-hub: PASS - Updates catalog settings, changes reflect in catalog-config

frontend_ui.wizard_progress: PASS - 6 steps visible: Basic Info, Images, Pricing, Variants, Stock & Vendor, Review
frontend_ui.step1_basic_info: PASS - Product name, category dropdown (dynamic), brand, description fields present
frontend_ui.step3_pricing: PASS - Selling price, original price, vendor cost, unit dropdown, SKU field, savings preview
frontend_ui.step4_variants: PASS - Checkbox to enable variants, add variant type button
frontend_ui.step5_stock_vendor: PASS - Total stock input, vendor assignment dropdown
frontend_ui.step6_review: PASS - Save Draft and Publish buttons with data-testid
frontend_ui.vendor_ops_dashboard: PASS - Stats banner, 3 tabs (Vendors, Products, Price Requests)
frontend_ui.toggle_publish_button: PASS - Eye/EyeOff icons on products with data-testid='toggle-publish-{id}'
frontend_ui.enter_quote_button: PASS - Orange 'Enter Quote' button on pending_vendor_response requests
frontend_ui.ready_for_sales_button: PASS - Green 'Ready for Sales' button on response_received requests
frontend_ui.settings_hub_catalog: PASS - Catalog group with 4 tabs in sidebar
frontend_ui.catalog_units_tab: PASS - Units of Measurement tab visible
frontend_ui.catalog_categories_tab: PASS - Product Categories tab with 12 categories, add/remove functionality
frontend_ui.catalog_sku_tab: PASS - SKU Configuration with prefix, format, and dynamic preview (KNT-ELC-8288)

notes: Rate limiting on login endpoint (429) caused initial test failures. Resolved by using shared session with single login. All features working as expected.
